title: Penalty on Bandhan Bank for KYC and Regulatory Non-Compliance
description: <cite index="36-14,36-15,36-16">RBI imposed a penalty of Rs. 41.8 lakh on Bandhan Bank for non-compliance with regulatory norms, including Know Your Customer guidelines. The bank failed to conduct periodic review of risk categorisation for certain accounts and had sanctioned director-related loans.</cite>
